confirm-close-description: Your changes may not be saved.
decrypt-error: Error while decrypting user's phone and email
edit-details-in-account: You can edit the details in your account.
email-legal-footer:
By continuing, I agree to the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink> and 
  acknowledge the <privacyPolicyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyPolicyLink>.
email-update-success: You've updated your email address successfully.
enhance-security-advice: To enhance the security of your account, we advise verifying the following information.
invalid-kind-description: It looks like you're using a non-auth Playbook. Please review and rectify the settings.
log-in-to-modify-details: Log in to modify your account details
phone-update-success: You've updated your phone number successfully.
scan-code-to-log-in: Scan the code to log in
token-missing-error: Token missing; unable to decrypt user's phone and email
use-camera-or-qr-reader: Use your camera app or QR code reader on your mobile device and we`ll continue from there.

notification.404-challenge-description: Please verify the provided token and try again.
notification.404-token-description: Please verify the provided token and try again.
notification.404-user-description: The user was not found or the provided token has expired. Please check your credentials and try again.
notification.invalid-config-subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this product.
notification.invalid-domain-description: Sorry, you don't have permission to access this application. It seems that the domain associated with your account is not authorized. If you need assistance, feel free to contact technical support.
notification.invalid-kind-description: It looks like you're using a non-auth Playbook. Please review and rectify the settings.
notification.missing-args-description: Oops! It seems like some required information is missing. Please navigate back in the process and make sure to provide all necessary details before proceeding.

sandbox.description: You can log into a previously created sandbox user by using the Test ID from that corresponding session.
sandbox.hint: Do not use special characters or spaces.
sandbox.label: Test ID

errors.invalid: Test ID is invalid. Please remove spaces and special characters.
